title: Flight Client
description: A little 1.20+ PVP client I have been working on, expect more modpacks and updates in the future.
body:
# 📝| Introduction
Flight Client is a 1.20+ optimization and Combat/PvP based client inspired by Lunar Client, Badlion Client, Hoplite Essentials and Combat Optimized designed for PvP Legacy and Hoplite however it works well with pretty much all servers.
# 🤔| Will I get banned for this?
This modpack has many mods all of which are safe to use on almost all PvP servers however there is a small chance of being banned make sure to check the allowed mods for the server you are using this on. If you get banned on a server for using any mods in this modpack **I am not responsible**.
# 💻| Installation
This modpack is a modrinth exclusive (for now) so here are a couple ways of installing it.
1. Download from the modrinth app.
2. Use a [Modrinth Pack to Zip converter](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/)
3. Use and external [Modpack Loader](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/).
# 🧮| Versions
A forge or quilt version will not be coming out at any point however I do plan on uploading new versions in the near future, keep in mind that is not a promise and this pack may not be updated. If this pack is updated I will not backport it, I will keep the updates 1.20+.
